$comment: Per-message GC engine routing (Fase B). Hot-reloaded by mtime: editing this file redirects message ids between the JS engine (gc-js bundle under Jint) and the legacy Lua/C# engine without restarting the server. Rollback: remove an id from migratedMessageIds, add it to disabledMessageIds, set jintEnabled=false, or export SKYNET_GC_JS_DISABLED=1.
